theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Organic & Earthy (Modified for Fintech/Earning)
theme_and_archetype.description: A professional, trustworthy, and vibrant money-earning app. Avoids cheap casino vibes and purple-gradient AI slop. Uses crisp white surfaces, deep Emerald Green for trust and financial stability, and Amber Gold for rewarding moments.

animations_and_interactions.micro_interactions: All touchable elements must have an active opacity (0.7) or scale down (0.95) effect on press. Use Reanimated or Animated API for smooth spring responses.
animations_and_interactions.reward_popups: Display in the center of the screen with a spring scale animation (from 0 to 1). Add a slight rotation to coins or stars.
animations_and_interactions.confetti_streak: Use 'lottie-react-native' for confetti bursts on the Refer screen and Daily Check-in streak. Render behind the success modal.
animations_and_interactions.spin_wheel: Use React Native Animated API with a rotating interpolation. Apply `Easing.out(Easing.cubic)` for a realistic slowdown effect.
animations_and_interactions.scratch_card: Implement using a masked view or a grid of small obscured squares that reveal the underlying reward when touched.

component_styles.buttons: Solid Emerald Green (#059669) background, White text, 14px border radius. 56px height for primary CTA. Bold text. Include `heavy_primary` shadow.
component_styles.mini_game_cards: White surface, 20px border radius, 1px solid border (#E2E8F0). Top half is the game thumbnail (16px radius top corners). Bottom half contains title, 'Play' text, and a small badge for points.
component_styles.balance_card: Gradient background or solid primary_dark (#047857) with a subtle noise/pattern. Large white text for balance, small text for INR conversion. Contains Withdraw button on the right or bottom.
component_styles.bottom_tabs: White background, floating style or standard with a top border. Active icon uses Emerald Green (#059669) with a small dot below. Inactive icon uses Slate 400.
component_styles.chips: Used for 'Amount' selection in Withdraw and 'Categories' in Wallet history. Background surface_variant (#F1F5F9), active background primary_light (#D1FAE5) with Emerald text.
component_styles.text_inputs: White background, 1px solid border (#E2E8F0), 14px radius. 56px height. Focused state changes border to Emerald Green.

mascot.description: 3D render of a cute friendly robot character holding a shiny gold coin. Use in the Profile screen saying hi, or on the empty states.

gold_coins_banner.description: Golden coins spilling. Use for 'High Paying Tasks' banner or Referral hero image.

gold_coins_stack.description: Stack of gold coins. Use for balance card background (with low opacity/overlay) or withdrawal success.

game_pattern_bg.description: Isometric colorful block pattern. Use as a masked background for the 'Play Games & Earn Rewards' section or game thumbnails.

confetti_bg.description: Multicolored confetti background. Use for Refer & Earn screen header background.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT USE TAILWIND CSS. This is an Expo React Native mobile project. Use standard StyleSheet.create() for all styles.
Apply testIDs to all interactive elements using standard format: data-testid='screen-name-element-type' (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Install `@expo-google-fonts/plus-jakarta-sans` and use `useFonts` hook in App.js to load fonts before rendering.
Use standard `TouchableOpacity` or `Pressable` for buttons. Implement `Animated` or `Reanimated` for all defined micro-interactions.
Ensure the layout relies on Flexbox (`flex: 1`, `flexDirection: 'row'`, `justifyContent`, `alignItems`).
All images must use React Native's `<Image>` component with proper `resizeMode` (usually 'cover' or 'contain').
